channels.name: Colour Wheel
channels.notes: 000 - 015 Open; 016 - 063 Colour 1-16; 064 - 127 Colour Wheel indexing; 128 - 189 Anti-clockwise rotation, fast to slow; 190 - 193 Stop colour rotation; 194 - 255 Clockwise rotation, slow to fast

channels.name: Gobo Wheel 1
channels.notes: 000 - 007 Open; 008 - 067 Gobo 1-7; 068 - 127 Gobo 1-7 shake; 128 - 189 Anti-clockwise rotation, fast to slow; 190 - 193 Stop Gobo wheel rotation; 194 - 255 Clockwise rotation, slow to fast

channels.name: Gobo Wheel 2

channels.name: Gobo Rotation
channels.notes: 000 - 127 Gobo indexing; 128 - 189 Gobo rotation, clockwise, fast to slow; 190 - 193 Stop rotation; 194 - 255 Anti-clockwise rotation, slow to fast

channels.name: Prisma Rotation
channels.notes: 000 - 127 Prisma indexing; 128 - 189 Prisma rotation, anti-clockwise, fast to slow; 190 - 193 Stop Prisma rotation; 194 - 255 Prisma rotation, clockwise, slow to fast

channels.name: Shutter / Strobe
channels.notes: 000 - 007 Off; 008 - 015 On; 016-131 Slow – fast, Stroboscope function; 132 - 139 Open; 140 - 181 Slow open, fast close; 182 - 189 Open; 190 - 231 Slow close, fast open; 232 - 239 Open; 240 - 247 Random Strobe; 248 - 255 Open

channels.name: Special Functions
channels.notes: 000 - 069 No function; 070 - 079 Blackout while panning / tilting; 080 - 089 No blackout while panning / tilting; 090-099 Blackout during colour changes; 100 - 109 No blackout during colour changes; 110 - 119 Blackout during Gobo changes; 120 - 129 No blackout during Gobo changes; 130 - 139 No function; 140 - 149 Pan/Tilt reset; 150 - 159 Reset effect wheels; 160 - 199 No function; 200 - 209 Reset all; 210 - 219 Blackout during all changes (Pan, Tilt, Gobo, Colours); 220 - 229 No blackout during all changes; 230 - 255 No function

channels.name: Pan/Tilt Macro
channels.notes: See Channel 5 in 17 Channel Mode: 000 - 007 Off; 008 - 255 Macro 1-31 (8 values per macro)
